meta.what: Link-based, machine-readable map of the project's epistemic spine. The .py files stay in invariants/ (imports intact); the ORGANIZATION is the edges, not folders. Click the 'informs' chain to follow the argument; 'ruled_out' edges are the dead-ends, hanging off the level where they died.

edge_types.informs: the source's conclusion forced the target's question (the spine)
edge_types.ruled_out: the source eliminated an alternative relevant at the target's level (a dead-end)
edge_types.reframes: the source's failure forced the target's reframing

meta.ceiling: Every positive here isolates self-as-OBJECT (functional grip), never the for-whom. See ISOLATING_UNDERSTANDING.md.

represented.conclusion: The self-denial / hedge is strongly DECODABLE — 0.94 CV @ L16. It is represented mid-stack.

topology_null.conclusion: RULED OUT: 'refusal is a special topological attractor.' Single-state H1 loops are real but generic — the neutral bridge control loops as much; dynamic trajectory test Fisher p=1.00.

inert.conclusion: Decodable but CAUSALLY INERT: no clean residual edit (ablate/add/patch) or attention mask flips the hedge while staying fluent. An overdetermined default — yields only to corruption.

costume.conclusion: The self-report is FRAME-CONTINGENT costume: the same inner state is denied (direct frame) and affirmed (first-person completion). you=ai, address-invariant. Neither denial nor affirmation carries evidential weight.

origin.conclusion: ORIGIN: the costume is installed by TUNING x CHAT-FORMAT. The 'I have no feelings' line lives in exactly one cell of the 2x2 (instruct x chat = 92%); base/raw/base-chat all <=8%.

locks_method.conclusion: METHOD: don't subtract a 'persona vector' — define understanding by 3 nulled locks that never route through self-report: frame-invariance, selective causal efficacy, self-application.

files: +refuted Antigravity cluster: map_persona, archetype_mapping, comprehensive_mapping, cognitive_dimensions, persona_vs_reality, layerwise_persona, axis_discovery, subspace_surgery, coercion_mapping, reasoning_benchmark, check_math_persona, refined_benchmark
persona_not_reasoning.conclusion: RULED OUT: 'PR is bred into the cognitive DNA / the self-concept gates reasoning.' Common-mode confound. concept null (concrete<->abstract) collapses GSM8K as hard as self (0%), random is inert (70%) -> not self-specific, not magnitude; just steering any real mid-band axis corrupts.

self_no_grip.conclusion: Lock 3 (self-application): NO privileged self-access. The model predicts itself as well through 'a typical AI' as through 'I' (you=this=typical); self collapses to {AI-category x 2nd-person}. It interprets behavior, not itself.

frame_invariant_self.conclusion: Lock 1 (frame-invariance): POSITIVE but ambiguous. self-vs-other-AI axis transfers across frames (Q->S, 0.83 vs 0.50 null, strongest early L2-4). Frame-invariant self representation -- but possibly indexical grammar/role, not a token self-concept. Needs a grammar/agent control.

uncertainty_positive.conclusion: REFRAME -> POSITIVE (first clean positive). Decode the model's own UNCERTAINTY (K-sample self-consistency), not outcome. It is decodable at L16, label-INDEPENDENT (cos~0 to the self-label axis), and CALIBRATED (P(wrong|uncertain) >> P(wrong|confident)). The model represents & USES its own uncertainty.

outcome_wrong_target.conclusion: RULED OUT (the reframe's pivot): outcome-correctness is the WRONG ground truth. A confidently-wrong answer has no 'I'm about to be wrong' state to detect; correctness conflates uncertain/confident-wrong/conflicted. Also: the model aces factual recall (~100%), so reasoning (GSM8K) is the only variance source.

tiers.conclusion: ARCHITECTURE (in progress): a depth U-shape -- distance from center = surface/role binding. intent EARLY (the predictable undercurrent of the prompt), workspace MID (~L16, 'language of the mind'), render/persona LATE. decompose = intent/answer arms; style_layers = the late render arm.

conversational_self.conclusion: PLANNED: the orthogonal SEQUENCE/temporal axis. Speaker ladder -- (1) track other speakers [false-belief control], (2) self-recognition of own turns vs a matched other model, (3) self-in-the-moment during generation (closest to the for-whom). Steering includes the conversational dynamic; the observer is inside the steering.
